name: Post-Match Statistics
description: Comprehensive post-match statistics infographic comparing both teams across key performance metrics. Published 30-60 minutes after full time.
guidelines: Use horizontal comparison bars with Dinamo stats in blue and opponent stats in a neutral gray. Each stat should be clearly labeled with values. Slide 1 shows the result and main stats (possession, shots, corners). Slide 2 shows detailed stats (passes, tackles, xG). Clean data visualization is paramount.
